name: Fast Beef-n-Noodles
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the noodles according to package instructions.
2. Add the bouillon cubes to the boiling water.
3. In a skillet, fry the ground beef with mushrooms until cooked through, then drain.
4. Drain the noodles and mix together the noodles, butter, mushrooms, ground beef, and soup.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Remember to check for salt before adding more, as condensed soups are already salty.
